title: Euceron (species)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Species |image= |name=Euceron |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Sentient]] |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions= |lifespan= |origin=[[Euceron]] |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|And where was security? I saw officers all around undercover, but when they were needed, they were strangely absent.''"
"''Perhaps fewer of them should be undercover. Some should be more visible.''"
"''The Eucerons hate the security forces. That's why they're undercover. But still, with so many visitors, keeping the peace is the first order of business.|[[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]''}} The '''Eucerons''' were a species native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Euceron]]. They were tall [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] with large, domed heads and delicate limbs. The Eucerons dressed in neutral colors, as if to offset the colorful building structures that filled their cities. Their government, the [[Ruling Power]], hosted the [[Galactic Games/Legends|Galactic Games]] on their world in [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Euceroner }} [[Category:Mid Rim sentient species]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Euceron]] }}
